messages.subject: Final exam schedule posted
messages.body: Your final exam for COMP248 is on December 12, 2026 at 9am in room A-401. Bring your student ID.

messages.subject: Assignment 3 — submission details
messages.body: Assignment 3 is now available. Please submit by November 20, 2026 on the portal.

messages.subject: Course feedback survey
messages.body: Help us improve. Complete the feedback form by October 30, 2026.

messages.subject: Tuition payment reminder
messages.body: Please pay your outstanding tuition fee before January 15, 2027 to avoid late charges.

messages.subject: Club workshop — RSVP needed
messages.body: Join our intro-to-React workshop on October 5, 2026. Please RSVP so we can plan seats.

messages.subject: This week on campus
messages.body: A roundup of clubs, food trucks, and study spaces open this week. No action needed.

messages.subject: Re: your project topic
messages.body: Thanks for the proposal. Can you confirm whether you will use the dataset we discussed?
